title: Shadows of Brimstone - Interlude - Unboxing Some New Purchases
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=adsB3sGIcVQ

Daniel (@dungeondive) pauses the deep dive to unbox a haul from the Flying Frog Productions web store. The star finds are the new Enemy Supplemental Packs—small add-ons that introduce named legendary enemies to existing deluxe enemy sets. Captain Burns and One-Eye Jackson join the Scafford Gang, while Solarius Dracoth and Taurio Gant bolster the Blasted Wastes warriors, each bringing unique threat cards and themed gear.

Two new large enemies follow: the Magma Giant (added to the Caverns of Cynder with special magma-coloured d8s and lava markers) and the Wasteland Terralisk (a burrowing predator for the Blasted Wastes rolling a staggering eight combat dice). Then come the card packs: the Holy Expedition supplement adds prayers, blessings, and judgments for Preacher characters plus unholy encounter overlays; Red Rock Gulch fills out the Canyons with cavalry relics and ghost warriors; and new Blasted Wastes daily events, artifacts, and encounters finally give Barter Town the depth it deserved—including the long-overdue "Who Runs the Barter Town?" card.

----

Which card pack expansion appeals to you most—the Holy Expedition's prayers or the Blasted Wastes' Barter Town events?
